mainBanner_description: UbuCon Korea, the annual event of the Ubuntu Korea community, is the largest gathering of Ubuntu users and contributors in Korea. This summer, we invite every developers, engineers, creators, researchers, entrepreneurs, and enthusiasts to join us again!
mainBanner_image_alt: Many people are walking around the venue. To the left is a photo wall bearing the words 'UbuCon Korea 2025', and to the right is the Canonical Ubuntu booth.
videoBanner_title: An event for people with Ubuntu and FOSS in common
videoBanner_description1: People from diverse backgrounds explore what we can do with Ubuntu and FOSS, as well as how we can contribute to their projects and communities.
videoBanner_description2: Not sure if this event is for you? Watch our aftermovie from last year.
cohostBanner_title: Cohosted with MiniDebConf Korea. Full of experience.
cohostBanner_description: This year, UbuCon Korea will be co-hosted with MiniDebConf Korea. Broader stories and wider communication with the Debian ecosystem are coming soon!
travelBanner_title: Let's meet at Microsoft Korea near Gwanghwamoon Gate!
travelBanner_description: Have you decided to join us for UbuCon Korea 2026 in Seoul? Start planning your trip today! Find helpful information below for preparing your travel.
travelBanner_button2: Contact travel support team for help
blogBanner_empty: We are preparing for the latest news. Stay tuned!
footer_top: Go to the top of the page
timetable_description: Check whole schedule of UbuCon Korea 2025
